productTitle: Ubiquiti G3 Access Reader Flex White
name: Ubiquiti G3 Access Reader Flex White
title: Ubiquiti G3 Access Reader Flex White
short_description: The Ubiquiti UniFi Access Reader G3 Flex White is a third-generation NFC card reader equipped with a keypad and supports Apple Touch Pass, providing multiple authentication methods for secure entry.
description: The Ubiquiti UniFi Access Reader G3 Flex White is a third-generation NFC card reader equipped with a keypad and supports Apple Touch Pass, providing multiple authentication methods for secure entry. Users can unlock doors using the keypad, NFC cards, the UniFi Identity mobile app, or Touch Pass, offering flexibility and convenience. The device also provides entry and exit greeting messages, enhancing the user experience during access events. The UA-G3-Flex-W combines advanced access control features, robust construction, seamless integration, and a user-friendly interface to provide a comprehensive solution for secure and efficient entry management.

detailed_description.heading: Advanced Access Control
detailed_description.text: The Ubiquiti UniFi Access Reader G3 Flex White is a third-generation NFC card reader equipped with a keypad and supports Apple Touch Pass, providing multiple authentication methods for secure entry. Users can unlock doors using the keypad, NFC cards, the UniFi Identity mobile app, or Touch Pass, offering flexibility and convenience. The device also provides entry and exit greeting messages, enhancing the user experience during access events. The UA-G3-Flex-W combines advanced access control features, robust construction, seamless integration, and a user-friendly interface to provide a comprehensive solution for secure and efficient entry management.

detailed_description.heading: User Interaction and Feedback
detailed_description.text: The UA-G3-Flex-W is designed with user interaction in mind, featuring capacitive buttons that provide responsive input, even when used with moisture or most gloves. The device includes an 8-ohm, 1W speaker that delivers clear audio feedback during access events, and multi-color LEDs (Red, Green, Blue, White) to visually indicate access status, providing immediate feedback to users. These features enhance the overall user experience by offering intuitive and immediate responses to access attempts, ensuring smooth and efficient entry management.

detailed_description.heading: Seamless Integration and Connectivity
detailed_description.text: Designed for easy integration into existing access control systems, the UA-G3-Flex-W connects to the UniFi Access Hub via Power over Ethernet (PoE), simplifying installation by reducing the need for additional power sources. The card reader features a 10/100 Mbps RJ45 networking interface, ensuring stable wired communication within the network. Additionally, it supports Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) 4.1 and NFC technology, allowing for flexible authentication options and compatibility with a wide range of access control devices.

detailed_description.heading: Durability and Management
detailed_description.text: The UA-G3-Flex-W is fully compatible with the UniFi Access application, starting from Version 3.0.15 and later, offering centralized management for configuring devices, monitoring access events, and customizing access settings. The card reader features an IP55-rated enclosure, ensuring protection against dust and water ingress. It operates efficiently in temperatures ranging from -30 to 60°C, making it suitable for both indoor and outdoor installations. The enclosure is constructed from durable materials, including polycarbonate, glass, and aluminum alloy, providing a sturdy design that ensures longevity and reliability.
